name: Fresh Pineapple Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups peeled, cored, cubed, fresh pineapple (about 1 1/2 cups)
1/3 cup chopped macadamia nuts or almonds
2 tablespoons rum flavoring plus 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and roll out the pastry for a double crust pie as directed.
2. Line a 9-inch pie plate with half of the pastry.
3. For filling, combine 2/3 cup sugar and the flour in a bowl. Add the pineapple, apricots, nuts, and rum flavoring mixture; gently toss until coated.
4. Transfer the fruit mixture to the pastry-lined pie plate. Trim the bottom pastry to the edge of the pie plate.
5. Cut slits in the top crust. Place it on the filling. Seal and flute the edges.
6. In a small bowl, combine 1 teaspoon granulated sugar and 1/8 teaspoon ground cinnamon. Brush the top crust with milk.
7. Sprinkle the mixture over the top crust.
8. Cover the edge of the pie with foil.
9. Bake in a 375°F oven for 25 minutes. Remove the foil and bake an additional 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Cool the pie on a wire rack. Serve and refrigerate any leftovers. Makes 8 servings.
